description:
| Number of cloud free observations | Colour (R,G,B) | Colour (Palette) |
|---|---|---|
| > 200 | 0, 97, 0 | (dark green) |
| 150 | 122, 171, 0 | (mid-green) |
| 100 | 255, 255, 0 | (yellow) |
| 50 | 255, 153, 0 | (orange) |
| 0 | 255, 34, 0 | (red) |
This table defines a colour palette for visualising the number of cloud-free observations, mapping higher counts (greater than 200) to a dark green (0, 97, 0) and lower counts (0) to a red (255, 34, 0), transitioning through mid-green (122, 171, 0), yellow (255, 255, 0), and orange (255, 153, 0).
